top.title: SAP BW Bridge or Data Product Generator (DPG): What would you choose
top.author: Ankit_Sarkar
top.summary: The blog explains the differences between SAP BW Bridge and Data Product Generator (DPG) when transitioning to Datasphere. It provides practical guidance to help users decide whether to migrate their BW system or adopt a modern data exploration approach.

top.title: Welcome to Season 10 of SAP Let’s Talk Data!
top.author: Corrie
top.summary: Season 10 of SAP Let’s Talk Data focuses on practical, technical insights for data professionals. It features lessons from experts who design and manage real-world data systems, moving away from high-level discussions to actionable knowledge.

title: SAP Sapphire 2026 unveiled key announcements with significant implications for the SAP partner ecosystem.
preview: The blog provides insights to help partners assess the potential impact of these developments on their strategies.
highlights: SAP Sapphire 2026 unveiled key announcements with significant implications for the SAP partner ecosystem.
The blog provides insights to help partners assess the potential impact of these developments on their strategies.
It serves as a resource for both attendees and non-attendees to stay informed about SAP's evolving direction.
The analysis is grounded in the author's research and experience, offering practical takeaways for partners.

top.title: SAP Sapphire 2026 Announcements and What it means to SAP Partner Ecosystem
top.author: Yellareddy
top.summary: The blog provides an overview of the key announcements made during SAP Sapphire 2026, focusing on their implications for the SAP partner ecosystem. It caters to both attendees and those who missed the event, offering insights based on the author's research and experience. The content aims to help partners understand the potential impact of these developments.

title: CMDP in SAP BDC using Datasphere VIEW involves multiple data copies before reaching Databricks, challenging the 'zero copy' concept.
preview: The blog provides insights into storage patterns and options for CMDP implementation, validated by SAP Product Engineering.
highlights: CMDP in SAP BDC using Datasphere VIEW involves multiple data copies before reaching Databricks, challenging the 'zero copy' concept.
The blog provides insights into storage patterns and options for CMDP implementation, validated by SAP Product Engineering.
SAP's 3-episode BW Modernization Masterclass supports partners in transitioning from legacy BW systems to modern cloud analytics platforms.
The masterclass simplifies BW modernization and equips participants to better assist their customers.

top.title: Customer-Managed Data Products in SAP BDC: What Really Happens When Your Source Is a Datasphere VIEW
top.author: I858551
top.summary: The blog post explores the storage patterns encountered when building a Customer-Managed Data Product (CMDP) in SAP Business Data Cloud using a Datasphere VIEW as the data source. It explains why multiple copies of data are created before reaching Databricks, discusses available options, and clarifies the concept of 'zero copy' in this context. The insights are based on a real enterprise implementation validated by SAP Product Engineering.

top.title: Transform Your BW Modernization Journey: Join SAP’s 3-Episode Modernization Masterclass
top.author: KarthikM8
top.summary: SAP has introduced a 3-episode masterclass to help partners transition from legacy Business Warehouse systems to modern cloud-based analytics platforms. This series aims to simplify BW modernization and equip participants with the necessary knowledge to support their customers effectively.

top.title: Customer-Managed Data Products in SAP BDC: What Really Happens When Your Source Is a Datasphere VIEW
top.author: I858551
top.summary: The blog post explores the storage patterns encountered when building a Customer-Managed Data Product (CMDP) in SAP Business Data Cloud using a Datasphere VIEW as the data source. It explains why multiple copies of data are created before reaching Databricks, discusses available options, and clarifies the concept of 'zero copy' in this context. The insights are based on a real enterprise implementation validated by SAP Product Engineering.

title: The SAP Analytics Cloud Home Screen now features a Blog Card introduced in Q2 2026 QRC.
preview: The Blog Card provides direct access to SAP Community updates from the dashboard.
highlights: The SAP Analytics Cloud Home Screen now features a Blog Card introduced in Q2 2026 QRC.
The Blog Card provides direct access to SAP Community updates from the dashboard.
This enhancement ensures users stay updated with the latest SAP news and insights effortlessly.

title: SAP Discovery Center introduces AI maturity assessments and SAP Business Data Cloud services to enhance solution development.
preview: Improved navigation and new Joule missions simplify the transition from exploration to production-ready solutions.
highlights: SAP Discovery Center introduces AI maturity assessments and SAP Business Data Cloud services to enhance solution development.
Improved navigation and new Joule missions simplify the transition from exploration to production-ready solutions.
Updates aim to provide expert guidance and streamline the user journey from inspiration to implementation.

top.title: What’s New in SAP Discovery Center: From Inspiration to Guidance
top.author: cecilysorenson
top.summary: The blog highlights the latest updates in SAP Discovery Center, introduced at SAP Sapphire 2026. Key enhancements include AI maturity assessments, SAP Business Data Cloud services, improved navigation, and new Joule missions, all aimed at streamlining the transition from exploration to production-ready solutions with expert support.
